lines.chords: Emaj7 -> E5 | Asus | C#7(no3) | B5 | Asus2

lines.lyrics: When your feeling lonely
Trust you're my one and only
I fell your love soft like the gentle snow
In the warmth of the fire we're already home

sections.name: Chorus
sections.annotation: Open hi-hats on quarters,Crash accents on bar downbeats, Four-on-the-floor kick - more driving and anthemic, Ride bell, Floor tom pulse on the 1

lines.lyrics: You, You already know, Won't let you go
Don't fear just let it be, it's safe lean in to me
Love feeling it grow, taking it slow
No pressure take your time,I'm yours and you are mine
Please, don't be afraid we've got it made
We're good it's gonna last, stop living in the past
True, my heart is true.  I'm here for you.
My heart is here to stay, trust I won't walk away

lines.chords: Emaj7 -> E5 | Asus | C#7(no3) | B5 | Asus2

lines.lyrics: If you're feeling insecure
Hold my vow, and know for sure
No need to question girl, we're in the flow.
If I promised by heart, than you already know.

sections.name: Chorus
sections.annotation: Open hi-hats on quarters,Crash accents on bar downbeats, Four-on-the-floor kick - more driving and anthemic, Ride bell, Floor tom pulse on the 1

sections.name: Bridge
sections.annotation: Half-time snare, Sparse kick, Rim clicks, Cymbal swells, Tom builds, Subtle shaker, China accent

lines.lyrics: Wishes they light up brighter than shooting stars
Believing in us, believing in who we are
It's more than a dream, wishes they do come true
Taking my chances babe, its me and you
